question.label: Blocker ownership
question.name: What are you waiting on that could quietly stall you?
question.description: Identifies dependencies that are not yet being escalated or managed.

answer: I'd like to do more mentoring. I brought it up maybe three months ago and nothing came of it. I'm not pushing.

assessment.note: They explicitly asked for more mentoring and said it was raised months ago with nothing happening, showing strong growth frustration and a slight disengagement signal from not pushing.

new_queue.label: Rewrite role
new_queue.name: What role would make sense for you in the billing rewrite?

new_queue.label: Rewrite risk
new_queue.name: Where do you expect the billing rewrite to get difficult?

new_queue.label: Mentoring path
new_queue.name: What would mentoring actually look like in your week, and what would you need to drop to make space for it?

new_queue.label: Stretch edge
new_queue.name: What part of your work right now feels most like a stretch?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
Cleanup and docs for payments, reviewing PRs for the new team members. Not much stretching me right now.
I'd like to do more mentoring. I brought it up maybe three months ago and nothing came of it. I'm not pushing.
